log_io_t(3) Library Functions Manual log_io_t(3)

NAME

log_io_t - Opaque handle for IO capture state.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/log/io.h>

Data Fields


int saved_stdout_fd
Saved stdout file descriptor. int saved_stderr_fd
Saved stderr file descriptor. int pipe_fd
Read end of pipe for captured output.

Detailed Description

Opaque handle for IO capture state.

Definition at line 29 of file io.h.

Field Documentation

int log_io_t::pipe_fd

Read end of pipe for captured output.

Definition at line 32 of file io.h.

Referenced by log_io_start(), and log_io_stop().
